links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The grey-chested greenlet (Hylophilus semicinereus) is a species of bird in the family Vireonidae, the vireos, greenlets, and shrike-babblers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, French Guiana, Peru, Venezuela, and possibly Colombia.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: juruanus: south of the upper Amazon/Solimões from northeastern Peru into northwestern Brazil to the Purus River The grey-chested greenlet inhabits the canopy, edges, and clearings of humid forest including várzea, permanently flooded forest, and secondary forest
